title: [FIRRTL] LowerClasses: drop the IR mapping
body: When puling the properties of a module out and into a class, walk the body of  module in reverse, moving or cloning property ops to the class as we encounter them. When we clone an op into the class, replaces uses of the "property results" with the clone's results. Doing this involves walking the uses of an op, and doesn't require an IRMapper or hashtable mapping old values to new values. This PR should improve the performance of lower-classes when a module with an extremely large number of remapped results.
